summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Women e-commerce platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (14/14 tests passed). Frontend mostly functional with some issues in product detail page and authentication persistence.

ui_bugs.issue: Product detail page shows loading spinner indefinitely and doesn't load product information
Authentication state not persisting properly across page navigations - cart shows 'Please login' even when logged in

integration_issues.issue: Cannot add products to cart due to product detail page not loading

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero slider, featured products, new arrivals, categories, newsletter
Navigation links work properly (Kurtis, Ethnic Dresses, etc.)
Login functionality works - admin login successful
Product listing page shows products with filters
Admin dashboard loads with stats and charts
Admin products page shows product list with 6 products
All backend authentication and authorization working
Newsletter form elements present and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix product detail page loading issue - product data not being fetched/displayed properly
Fix authentication state persistence across page navigations
Investigate product ID routing in ProductDetailPage component
Check cart authentication state management in AuthContext
